interface.name: PS_F_GenericRequest
interface.description: The inmate creates a generic request
interface.definition:
a!localVariables( local!inmate: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418098"(userName: loggedInUser()), local!requestSubject, local!requestText,
#"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_formLayout_v2"( titleBar: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerTemplateSimple"( title: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:65850d51-506a-4ee0-9158-c15e3dd3e7a0" ), showTitleBarDivider: true, contentsWidth: "FULL", backgroundColor: "TRANSPARENT", contents: { #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418867"( shape: "SEMI_ROUNDED", marginBelow: "MORE", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:9818ce68-55e7-49d6-9d1c-b92fe4c4e1c0", required: true, accessibilityText: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:9818ce68-55e7-49d6-9d1c-b92fe4c4e1c0", value: local!requestSubject, saveInto: local!requestSubject ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_paragraphField"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:e2779f93-1160-4eec-b795-e48b5c5f48a1", required: true, accessibilityText: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:65850d51-506a-4ee0-9158-c15e3dd3e7a0", characterLimit: 4000, refreshAfter: "KEYPRESS", value: local!requestText, saveInto: local!requestText ), } ), #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1605697"( text: { #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:66305000-5215-4cdd-88ca-7881a095dd67", #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:d185410b-77e9-4d79-847f-a3a077b4cb2d" }, label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:63c774cf-5f27-490b-90ae-53f22a550fde" ) }, buttons: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_ButtonLayout"( secondaryButtons: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:d940fe67-4bc0-43d9-9eca-be0aa0394b8a", submit: true, validate: false, value: true, saveInto: ri!cancel ), primaryButtons: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:f77c5ad7-1935-44cc-a63e-843733004e30", style: "SOLID", submit: true, disabled: a!isNullOrEmpty(local!requestText), saveInto: { a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/0158bc6e-dc82-471e-b662-acc363b9ba87"], value: false ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/4399f51f-64fe-4714-9e9e-3b30238666ed"], value: loggedInUser() ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/a2219542-a8b5-464d-9306-5654dce49a83"], value: now() ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/c705d2d0-bbc1-404a-bbc5-93cffc1a8c52"], value: month(today()) ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/13ac8f18-8fd8-4341-8f42-86db1aaa8588"], value: year(today()) ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/b7965e68-ff18-4b2f-8f7b-efb3fb5e298b"], value: now() ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/746e407a-2a3a-4a00-b4fc-59b2103b6131"], value: loggedInUser() ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/f3ba344c-c6d8-48a9-b57e-2ac2380a8f74"], value: now() ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/a2e6a1a3-9952-4aee-a7d5-c5077d3fb9be"], value: local!inmate[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/d70d7a0c-0ee6-4949-84d6-2c58d8caffcc"] ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/95432e14-73d0-40f5-aef3-cfa048d229b2"], value: local!requestSubject ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/f8dcda47-3bef-4211-990e-586f5ea7080b"], value: local!requestText ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/7ac9c394-ee75-466f-9790-274b821dd0af"], value: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1411841" ), a!save( target: ri!request[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:869b0f23-8e42-4780-8dfc-89deb24c798d/8f6e62d6-f646-45a8-a038-e356580cbf87"], value: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1555262" ) } ) ) ) )
